svg.title: MathTok 7-layer pipeline with proposed improvements per layer
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing each of the 7 layers of the MathTok pipeline, color-coded by status: teal for strong layers, amber for layers needing improvement, and red for critical gaps.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should the canonicalization engine handle unsimplifiable expressions?')
g.text: Add timeout guard; cache sympy results

svg.text: + Timeout for sympy hangs on complex
+ LRU cache to avoid re-parsing duplicates

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How can the hybrid lexer better handle mixed text and math?')

svg.text: + Confidence score per span (math vs text)
+ Fallback to GPT-2 BPE for ambiguous spans

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What improvements can be made to the AST generator?')
g.text: Add parse failure fallback; depth cap

svg.text: + Graceful fallback when sympy parse fails

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How can the semantic registry be extended for more math domains?')
g.text: Extend to geometry, stats, set theory

svg.text: + Commutativity flag (x+y ≡ y+x at token level)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are the tradeoffs of DFS preorder vs other tree serialization orders?')
g.text: Add bracket tokens; test alt. traversals

svg.text: + Experiment with postorder for calculus ops
+ Subtree hash for dedup at sequence level

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should structural attention metadata be validated experimentally?')

svg.text: + Ablation study: does metadata help accuracy?
+ Expose metadata as optional (not forced on)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should the BPE vocabulary handle unknown math symbols?')

svg.text: + Grow fixed vocab to cover Greek/set notation
+ Verify HF tokenizer fast-path is preserved
